title: Minewache-Pack
body:
[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Die_Minewache/BH_MD_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/sarocesch)

## these textures are for the [Minewache modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/die-minewache-modpack)

### Changes:
#
- modularwarfare = Tactical Lv1 Vest to Police Vest
- grapplemod = invisible hook
- dynamxmod = invisible Icons
